_source: Zewail City of Science, Technology and Innovation — Academic Regulations Handbook

grade_structure.note: Coursework (60 marks) is uploaded to Google Classroom. Final exam (40 marks) is administered separately and is never uploaded to Classroom.

passing_conditions.note: A student FAILS a course if their total grade is below 60/100 OR if they score below 14/40 on the final exam, even if the total would otherwise be passing.

academic_standing.dismissal_after: Failure to reach 2.0 CGPA after both WS1 and WS2

probation_rules: Students whose CGPA falls below 2.0 are placed on academic probation.
Probation students may not register more than 12 credit hours per semester.
Two consecutive warning semesters (WS1, WS2) are granted to recover CGPA to 2.0.
Failure to achieve minimum CGPA after WS2 results in academic dismissal.
